chapter_title.en: The Obligation of the jumu’ah Prayer, Its Virtue, Who is Exempt From it, and the Prayer and Sermon Therein

text: 1228 - وَ كَانَ مُوسَى بْنُ جَعْفَرٍ عَلَيْهِمَا اَلسَّلاَمُ يَتَهَيَّأُ يَوْمَ اَلْخَمِيسِ لِلْجُمُعَةِ.

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications: Hadith.1228 - Imam Musa ibn Jafar Al-Kadhim (as) used to prepare on Thursday for the Jumu’ah prayer.
